<!-- Shared band legend. Pull into any sheet with:
     {{< include _includes/band-legend.qmd >}}
     Keeps the three recurring bands identical across all sheets. -->

::: {.trap-band}
⚠️ **Watch out** — <!-- TODO: the classic mistake for this topic -->
:::

::: {.check-band}
✅ **Non-mutating check** — a *check* is `print(x)` or a bare `x`. **Never** an assignment.
:::

::: {.evidence-band}
🔎 **Show your evidence** — <!-- TODO: predict / trace / test / debug / explain move for this topic -->
:::
